text: I feel slightly disoriented, as if the world is tilted on its axis. The stark artificial lighting and sharp lines of the glass partition distance me from any sense of comfort or familiarity. Yet, as I enter further, vibrant colors and the celebration of research and development spark a flicker of curiosity amidst my fatigue. Spaces such as these prompt me to question how environments shape emotion and attention, and how even exhaustion is woven into the tapestry of discovery.
